Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 136 

SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_LEAD_SW 

LABEL: Core HRSN Housing 2: Lead Paint Pipes 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) housing has lead paint or pipes. 

LONG NAME: SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_LEAD_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables that start with “SR” include information for
